meetings.title: Minute Media / Elsa (logged call)
meetings.notes: Elsa said the purchase by Axel Springer has slowed down commercial conversations. Will need to wait for the dust to settle.

meetings.title: SoundCloud / Ben (logged call)
meetings.notes: Ben offered to introduce me to head of monetisation via email. Should happen today — however they are very audio heavy vs display/video.

meetings.title: Paramount (logged call)
meetings.notes: Predominantly CTV. Undergoing purchase of Warner — uncertain how teams will merge. Use Freewheel as primary ad server with Springserve for other partners via S2S. CTV mostly sold out. Have own direct integration layer (Conduit) hooking into Magnite/Google AdX. Next step: call with ops/tech team.

linkedin.text: LinkedIn reply from InDrive contact: Thanks for reaching out Dan — could you please email details about adding BidMachine's app demand to our stack?
